seo.title: Iron Oak Power | Premium Solar Infrastructure
seo.description: IronOak Power designs and builds durable solar systems for residential, commercial, and agricultural properties across Canada and the United States.
seo.keywords: Solar Energy, Solar Panels Canada, Sustainable Energy, IronOak Power, Solar Infrastructure

hero.title: Built to last.
hero.description: At IronOak Power, we specialize in providing reliable, high-performance solar and energy solutions for commercial, industrial, and agricultural properties.

services.title: Residential Solar Installations
services.desc: We don’t just install your system and walk away. Our ongoing maintenance services ensure your solar and energy systems are performing at their best — year after year. With real-time expert support, you can feel confident in your investment.

services.title: Commercial Solar Installations
services.desc: We design and install custom solar energy systems that reduce your reliance on the grid and lower your long-term energy expenses. From rooftop arrays to ground-mounted systems, our team delivers solutions that are built to perform — and built to last.

services.title: Project Consulting & Development Support
services.desc: From feasibility assessments to permitting and incentive navigation, Iron Oak Power provides the guidance you need to bring your project to life. Our team works closely with property owners, developers, and business leaders to streamline the process and deliver results.

footer.title: Let's Build the
footer.description: Partner with the industry leaders in sustainable power infrastructure. Efficiency, durability, and innovation at every scale.

blogs.title: The Future of Solar Energy in Canada
blogs.excerpt: Exploring the latest trends and government incentives for solar adoption in 2026.

blogs.title: Maintaining Your Solar Panels for Max Efficiency
blogs.excerpt: A guide to keeping your solar investment performing at its peak year-round.
